archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Editorial Art

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use Playfair Display for massive, artistic headings (the 'tattoo/art' vibe). Use Outfit for highly legible, modern tech UI (dashboards, forms). Gap between heading and subtitle must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

colors.rules: Use the 'Tinted Grey' rule. Never use pure black/gray, always tint with warmth for skin/ink vibes. Contrast ratio MUST be APCA compliant. Always set hover states explicitly (e.g., hover:bg-neutral-800 hover:text-white).

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing for high-end editorial feel.

grids.marketing: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical spans (col-span-8 for hero images, col-span-4 for supporting text) to create visual tension.
grids.dashboard: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid for studio management (gap-6, high density).

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). No fully rounded pills. Solid deep black for primary CTA. 1px solid border for secondary.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and crisp shadow (shadow-md).
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism for sticky nav: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Ensure high-contrast text.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components but heavily customize. Remove the 'Vercel-look'. Use generous padding, 1px black focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-black), and crisp borders. Strip shadow-sm from inputs.
components.file_upload: For reference images and AI Style Advisor, use dashed borders with a subtle background tint (bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100) and an icon from Phosphor Icons.

imagery_and_media.description: Abstract black ink swirl for landing page hero or AI Style Advisor background. High-end, editorial feel.
Abstract minimalist app logo, to be used in navigation and footer.
Clean, minimal tattoo studio interior for 'Featured Studios' or 'About' sections.
Artist inking client arm, for featured artists section.
Tattoo artist preparing, for artist profile page or dashboard welcome.
Minimalist fine line tattoo example for gallery placeholders.
Fine line bicep tattoo example for gallery placeholders.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use smooth, deliberate transitions (transition-all duration-300 ease-out). Avoid bouncy/elastic animations. Keep interactions professional and precise.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE ON FILE TYPES: Implement all frontend components using JavaScript (.js/.jsx), NOT TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
ICONOGRAPHY: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone or thin weight icons.
TYPOGRAPHY: Import Playfair Display (Headings) and Outfit (Body) from Google Fonts.
STYLING: Use Archetype 4 Light Theme styling: deep ink black (#0A0A0A) for primary actions, stark white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds, and sharp 1px borders.
MARKETING VS APP: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the landing page to achieve overlapping/asymmetric editorial layouts. Use customized Shadcn UI components for the Dashboard and Booking Flow.
HERO OVERLAYS: If text is placed over the hero image, do not use a heavy black blanket. Use a gradient overlay or keep the text on a solid color block to preserve the image.
LANGUAGE TOGGLE: Ensure a clear, minimal UI for switching between German (DE) and English (EN) in the navigation bar.

STRIPE & AI UI: For the Stripe deposit flow, use crisp, minimal input fields. For the AI Style Advisor, style the chat/upload area with an 'editorial tech' vibe (stark borders, generative loading animations).
